description: Research closed-lost deals in CRM. Update company/contact info. Add quality prospects to backlog list. Focus on legit companies, recent contacts.

Coordinate dinner on 25th. Create list of invitees (founders, growth/marketing leaders). Set up project in Slack for team coordination.
Sort Slack channels. Create folders (e.g. 'internal clients'). Move channels to appropriate folders. Prepare list of inactive channels for potential archiving.
